mapper.select: SELECT id, vehicle_count, CAST(heatmap_data AS CHAR) AS heatmap_data, stat_time FROM congestion_logs ORDER BY stat_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, vehicle_count, CAST(heatmap_data AS CHAR) AS heatmap_data, stat_time FROM congestion_logs ORDER BY stat_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(vehicle_count), 0) FROM congestion_logs WHERE DATE(stat_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO congestion_logs (vehicle_count, heatmap_data, stat_time) VALUES (#{vehicleCount}, #{heatmapData}, #{statTime})
